result.stdout:
Description:
  Journey - Database Migration Tool

Usage:
  Journey.Net [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  scaffold  Scaffold the next version migration file.
  migrate   Migrate the database to a target version.
  rollback  Rollback the database to a target version.
  validate  Validate the migration files.
  history   Show migration history.
  update    Update the database to the latest version.

commands.payload:
Description:
  Journey - Database Migration Tool

Usage:
  Journey.Net [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  scaffold  Scaffold the next version migration file.
  migrate   Migrate the database to a target version.
  rollback  Rollback the database to a target version.
  validate  Validate the migration files.
  history   Show migration history.
  update    Update the database to the latest version.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Show migration history.

Usage:
  Journey.Net history [options]

Options:
  -p, --path <path> (REQUIRED)              The path to the versions directory.
  -c, --connection <connection> (REQUIRED)  The connection string for connecting to the database
  -d, --database <database> (REQUIRED)      The type of the database to migrate.
  -s, --schema <schema>                     The schema to apply the migration to. [default: public]
  -q, --quiet                               Run the action without prompts. [default: False]
  -e, --entries <entries>                   The number of versions back to retrieve. [default: 10]
  -v, --verbose                             Print out migration queries as they are executed. [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help                            Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Migrate the database to a target version.

Usage:
  Journey.Net migrate [options]

Options:
  -p, --path <path> (REQUIRED)              The path to the versions directory.
  -c, --connection <connection> (REQUIRED)  The connection string for connecting to the database
  -d, --database <database> (REQUIRED)      The type of the database to migrate.
  -s, --schema <schema>                     The schema to apply the migration to. [default: public]
  -q, --quiet                               Run the action without prompts. [default: False]
  -t, --target <target>                     The target version.
  -v, --verbose                             Print out migration queries as they are executed. [default: False]
  -r, --dry-run                             Immediately rollback migrations after they have been executed. [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help                            Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Migrate the database to a target version.

Usage:
  Journey.Net migrate [options]

Options:
  -p, --path <path> (REQUIRED)              The path to the versions directory.
  -c, --connection <connection> (REQUIRED)  The connection string for connecting to the database
  -d, --database <database> (REQUIRED)      The type of the database to migrate.
  -s, --schema <schema>                     The schema to apply the migration to. [default: public]
  -q, --quiet                               Run the action without prompts. [default: False]
  -t, --target <target>                     The target version.
  -v, --verbose                             Print out migration queries as they are executed. [default: False]
  -r, --dry-run                             Immediately rollback migrations after they have been executed. [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help                            Show help and usage information
